titleStmt.title: SII 18.104: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 104. (B.K. No. 188 of 1932-33.) GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the northern prākāra of the Vīranārāyaṇasvāmin temple.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 25, Vikrama, Māgha śu. 5, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1101, January 6, Sunday. There was, however, no saṁkramaṇa on that day.

It states that Honnavara Maddimayya, son of Dēmaya-Ghaisāsa constructed the temple of Saṅkaranārāyaṇa and made a grant of money for the worship and offerings to that god. It also records a gift made by the One-thousand (Mahājanas) of Lokkiguṇḍi to the temple and the feeding house attached to it. The record is badly damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁba
raṁ saluttamire © svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhāna parāyaṇa japasamādhiśīla
rssamastaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkṛtarvviditavēdārtthavidyāpāragarṣaṭkarmma niratarssa ptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṛthāvagāhanapavi
trīkṛtaśarīrarccaturvvēdapāragaraṣṭādaśadharmmaśāstrakuśalarēkavākyaracaḷitadhairyya rdhairyyaparākramarāśrita
ja nakalpavṛkṣarahitapakṣakṣayakararkaliyugagāṁgēyarpparamaparōpakārigaḷāhavadhu randhararśāpānu
grahasamarttharkkāryyabṛhaspatigaḷēkaikapaṇḍitargrāmanāmōttamarvvaiṣṇavagī timanōhararppāpabhīrugaḷpa
ranārīdūrardduṣṭavidhvaṁsakarvviśiṣṭajanāśraya rkkāmakrōdhalōbhamōhaviva rjjitarddvātriṁśatsahasrasamayārgghyā
rhadvijakuḷatiḷakarśśaraṇā guṇaviśēṣōnnatarappa śrīrāmaradattimahāgrāmaṁ śrīmallo
kkiguṇḍiyūroḍeyapramukhamahājanaṁ sāsirvvaruṁ samasta gōlegōbrāhmaṇa rmmodalāgi sabālavṛddha
ruṁ neredu dharmmaṁgaḷaṁ svadharmmadiṁ surakṣitamāgi rakṣisuttamire . © vananidhiparivṛta vasudheyoḷanupama
vagrahāralakṣmīpuṁ denikuṁ śrīlokkiguṇḍimūṟuṁ jaga doḷ . śrīkāntānana
kṛtinijaviśuddhakīrttisaṁvṛtabhūlōkaṁ jitāmarādhipalōkaṁ śrīlokki guṇḍi sogayisi tōrkkuṁ . Intenisida mahāgrā
vara vaṁśāvatāramentendaḍe . v® . sarasijagarbhbhavaṁśadoḷagaggaḷagautamagōtrarī dharā mara
reyde saccaritarudārarudghayaśarendu manōmudadindekūrttu vistaradoḷ baṇni
tradoḷ . śivamayyaṁ tadgōtrōdbhavanavitata namaḷaguṇayutanudya ddharmma yaśō
naghavidhvaṁsa . Ātana kulavadhu bhūbhṛjjātegarunndhatigamaggada maṁ vikhyāteya ḷ sale
tadvamśadoḷ . Ā dēyikabbegaṁ śivamayyaṁgaṁ śrīmaccāmanakhiḷaguṇa
ghaisāsaṁ maganī mahiyoḷ vimaḷacaritanapagatadurita . kamaḷabhavaṁ vinirmmi varṇnacatu
jakramamene sanda tatkuḷama pavitramādudeṁbamaḷinakīrttiyaṁ vēdaśāstra
nurāgadiṁ pogaḷe tadvijananeydidanunnati . Intu po
geṇe dēcikabbe patihitaguṇadiṁdī mahige pūjye sakaḷadharāmara
bhāveyante putriyene . v® . bhāsuratēja parama vēdaśāstra
rmmaviśārada sakaḷōrvvi kīrttisuva pempinoḷoppuva nā gacaṁ
dēcikabbeya Intu kīrttigāppadamāda dēcikabbegaṁ dēmayaghaisāsa jaḷanidhiyoḷe ratnaṁ śaśikaḷā
dinādhipa mesevavol suputrakuḷadīpakanenisi mayyaṁ negardda . v® . Ātana
tiyiṁ negarda tāṇa tiśayaṁgaḷaṁ pogaḷalabja yaṁ māto manujarārnnereye baṇṇipa
de vikhyātiyaṁ dhare baṇnisutirppudu maddimayyanaṁ . ka . śubhamoḍavuṭṭe nijānvaya
tanna caritaṁ lōkakkabhinutame na bhūtō na bhaviṣyati yenisi maddimayyam negarddam . Avarivarentu
vara ponnavara maddimayyaṁgeṇeyappavara kāṇe dēṁ kēvaḷame . v® k®tārttha
tartthamanartthigegoṭṭu lōka māge jaga dādyara ttamadānadiṁ
ḍisi kīrttiyaṁ diśābhittivaraṁ nimirccidaḷavanaḷavaṭṭuṁṭe maddimayyanoḷ . ka . sakaḷaguṇāṁbhōnidhi nijakuḷalalāma
śritajanasantānasā neṁbinama maddimayyaniḷātaḷadoḷ . Ā maddimayyanāyakananujanentene .
bhinuta mahimāvibhavaṁ sukṛtaikaniḷayanacyutabhaktaṁ prabhu cāmeya ghaisāsaṁ tribhuvanadoḷagagragaṇyanuṁ
nijānujanentene . v® . Anupamatējaneṁdu vinayāṁbudhiyendakhi ḷēṣṭaśiṣṭasajjananidhiyeṁdu satya
neṁdu dayānvitaneṁdu dharmmacittanananavadyavṛttananaghaughanikṛttananoldu dhātri tānanunayadiṁde baṇnipu
gōtraśikhāmaṇi cāmiyaṇnanaṁ . paramasukṛtārtthado ta guṇāḍhyaneṁdu cāmayaghaisāsara su
siriyaṇnananurumudadiṁdosedu vasudhe baṇnisutirkkuṁ . Intellaṁ pogarttege neleyāda maddimayyanāyakaṁ
cittanāgi . ka . sāraṁ muktiśrīgidu kāraṇameṁdaṟidu maddimayyaṁ sarvvasāramidenisire śaṁkaranārāyaṇana
yaṁ māḍisidaṁ . Idu viśvakarmmanirmmitamidu celvina janmabhūmiyidu bhāvise citradinativicitramāytene muda
viṣṇubhavanamaṁ māḍisidaṁ . mattaṁ . A ge dharmmētaṁ keṟeyārave satrameṁbinaṁ santōsadiṁ neṟe māḍi sukṛtatatiyaṁ
ponnavara maddimayyaṁ jagadoḷ [. ma]ttamā puṇyabhājanaṁ bhūmidānaṁgaḷoḷa gāgi palavuṁ dharmmaṁgaḷaṁ māḍi ©
maccāḷukyavikramakālada 25 neya vikramasaṁvatsarada māgha suddha 5 Ādivāra Uttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇaṁ vyatīpāta
mahātithiyoḷ honnavara maddimayyanāyakaṁ tamma śaṁkaranārā yaṇadēvaraṁgabhōgakke koṭṭa gadyāṇaṁ 140 Ādē
ḷe gandha puṟpa dhūpa nandādīvige nivēdyaṁ caitrapavitrārōpaṇaṁ pārāyaṇada pannirvvarbrāhmaṇara dakṣiṇegaṁ dēvara pū
ṇiya jīvitavādiyāgi na Alliyaṟavaṁṭagege koṭṭa gadyāṇaṁ 10 Ā ponnavṛddhiyiṁdadaṁ naḍayisuvaru .
mattamalli satrakke koṭṭa gadyāṇa 240 Ā ponnavṛddhiyiṁ pannirvvarbrāhma ṇargge naḍayisuvaru © baṭṭakeṟeya ba
ṭṭeya tammakeṟege Ā keṟeya meyya baṭṭakeṟeya poladoḷa ge kālgarccu goṭṭu biṭṭa keyi mattaru 16 mattamā keṟege koṭṭa
gadyāṇa 30 Ā ponnavṛddhiyiṁda vā kereyaṁ paḍisalistu varu [.] Ā karandigeya kaḷḷada bāviya dharmmētakke koṭṭa
gadyāṇa 10 Ā ponnavṛddhiyiṁda naḍayisuvaru Alliyaṟavaṁṭagege koṭṭa gadyāṇaṁ 10 Ā ponna vṛddhiyiṁdadaṁ naḍayisuvaru .
Alli pathaśrāntarāgi bandabaliyuṇbavara grāsakke koṭṭa gadyāṇa10 Ā honna vṛddhi yiṁdadaṁ naḍayisuvaru . Ante satraṁ
gadyāṇaṁ 410 Ī modala phonnaṁ kiḍalīyade doḷ honnavarakuḷa kamaḷadivākaraṁ cāmayaphaisāsaruṁ ponnavarakuḷatiḷakaṁmaddi
gaḷ pramukhamāge rellaṁ tamma dharmmaṁgaḷaṁ kiḍalīyade pratipāḷisi naḍeyisuvaru . ©
śankaranārāyaṇadēvargge niccaluṁ nūṟu bele naḍevantāgi ghaḷigeya maddi mayyaṁgaḷ taṭṭeya baṭṭeyiṁ paḍuvaṇa meyya
ḷpattiya bhūmiyoḷage biṭṭa śrīśaṁkaranārāyaṇadēva gṛhakkaṁ valliya satrada manegaṁ śrī sāsirvvaruṁ
rvvanamasyavāgi biṭṭapatti © Ī dharmmaṁgaḷaṁ śrī sāsirvvaruṁ pratipāḷisuvaru . Intī dharmmaṁgaḷaṁ ra
ge vāraṇāsiyargghyatīrttha gaya kurukṣētra modalāgi puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷ sūryya grahaṇa
ragarappa sāsira brāhmaṇargge sudhēnuvāgi vatsasamētaṁ sāsira kavileyaṁ suvarṇnā ḷaṁkāra sahi
varu . Ī dharmmamanaḷidavarā puṇyatīrtthadoḷanitu brāhmaṇarumanā kavileyumaṁ vadheya
pparu © svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāya
lanaṁ vēti dānācchrēyānupālanaṁ dānātsvarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . © dhare jaḷadhi ku
caḷamumeydenilvinamativistaradiṁdī śāsanamaṁ baredaṁ nija śrīmatpuligeṟe
na magaṁ birudarūvārībhakaṇṭhīravaṁ sāva nāṁtakkaravaṁ barmmōjana magam kramadiṁ besageydaṁ . janapa
miśra tmakaṁ tanusamahastapādalikhitōttaraśāstraviśēṣa nuṁ mmayya
varatanu sallakṣaṇaṁ negaḷda nidēṁ kṛtārtthanō
kramarssa paṁca nidhānada lōA few lines after this are completely damaged.
Digital edition of SII 18.104 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
